channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large Pothole, 4th March
item.description:
Where Willowherb Close meets Whitethorn Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Willowherb Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrians forced to walk in main road as pavement blocked, 4th March
item.description:
10 Hatherley Road GL51 6DX Loss.target.achieving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 4th March
item.description:
SL report confusing signage at this location - see screen grabs
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Pothole, 4th March
item.description:
